_comment: EXAMPLE format metadata extension for forks that include the ik_llama.cpp imatrix-aware quant family (IQ4_K, IQ4_KS, IQ4_KSS, IQ4_KT, IQ3_K, IQ3_KS, IQ2_K). Drop this file at <binary>/../../tools/prismaquant/format_metadata_ikllama.json (fork-shipped extension) OR ~/.config/prismaquant-llama/format_metadata_ikllama.json (user override) and prismaquant-llama will auto-discover it on the next run. The base ships with mainline-only metadata to keep the tool fork-agnostic; if you use any fork with IK-K-family quants, copy this file to one of those convention paths to get the recommend flags + curated notes for these formats. (Or generate your own from your binary via `prismaquant-llama discover --generate-metadata <out>.json`.)
